summary: Phase 6 (WhatsApp opt-out + executive WA delivery dashboard) fully verified. Backend: 13/13 pytest tests passing in /app/backend/tests/test_phase6.py. Frontend: all Phase 6 selectors verified on production URL via Playwright. Live Fonnte quota stayed at 954 across opt-out create flow (no live send when operator opted-out). Live stats page rendered quota=954, sent=2/24h, success_rate=50% from 4 attempts, 14-day trend SVG charts present, per-event distribution rendered.

issues: Recharts console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' on initial render — ResponsiveContainer parent has no defined height during first paint. Cosmetic only; chart renders correctly afterwards. Consider giving the chart wrapper an explicit min-height to silence warnings.

action_items: (cosmetic) Wrap WA trend LineChart's ResponsiveContainer with a div className='h-56' (or min-h) to eliminate Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on first paint.
(carry-over) server.py is now ~1870 lines — strongly recommend splitting into modules (auth, tickets, layanan, kb, audit, admin, executive, fonnte_handlers, wa_stats).

(hygiene) /api/executive/whatsapp-stats response includes `recent_failures` items via doc_to_public, which keeps mongo's `id` field — good. Frontend conditionally renders the table only when failures exist (verified — not present on current data, which is correct per spec).
critical_code_review_comments: notify_operator_wa correctly orders checks: opt-out check FIRST (before phone) so an opted-out operator always gets skipped log even if no phone — good for accurate metrics.
wa_logs documents always include `skipped` flag (bool), `status` (bool), `event_type`, `phone_last4` (redacted). PII safe.
PATCH /auth/preferences uses Depends(get_current_user) (not require_role), so any logged-in user — operator OR koord — can update their own preference. Correct.

GET /executive/whatsapp-stats uses require_role('koordinator') → operator gets 403 ✓ (verified). Returns full shape with 14-day timeline always (filled with zeros for empty days) — good for chart rendering.

Date filter behavior: from_date/to_date apply ONLY to total/sent/failed/skipped/by_event but NOT to sent_24h/7d/30d/timeline (those use rolling windows). This is intentional but should be documented in the UI; currently the UI may confuse a user when applying a date filter and seeing trend chart unchanged.
POST /admin/test-whatsapp now writes wa_logs row with event_type='test' — verified by test_test_wa_writes_to_logs which confirmed total counter incremented AND 'test' appeared in by_event bucket.

Frontend Switch logic: `checked={!waOptOut}` and `onCheckedChange={(v) => toggleWa(!v)}` — semantics correct: switch ON means notifications ON means wa_opt_out=false. Verified via /api/auth/me round-trip (toggle OFF → wa_opt_out=true returned in /me).
Frontend operator role guard on /executive works — operator visiting /executive is redirected to /dashboard (verified).

Executive WA section renders 4 stat cards with proper data-testids in correct order: wa-stat-quota, wa-stat-sent, wa-stat-failed, wa-stat-success-rate. Recent failures table is conditional (only when failures>0) — verified absent because no failures exist in current DB.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_PHASE6 tickets (opt-out + no-phone) during trigger tests. Cleanup hook calls /api/admin/cleanup-test-tickets at end. Operator opt-out state restored to False at teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 fully functional. Selectors verified: wa-stats-section, wa-stat-quota, wa-stat-sent, wa-stat-failed, wa-stat-success-rate, wa-recent-failures (conditional), wa-optin-switch. Endpoint paths: PATCH /api/auth/preferences (any logged-in user, body {wa_opt_out:bool}), GET /api/executive/whatsapp-stats?from_date=&to_date= (koord only, 14-day timeline always present). wa_logs collection is the source of truth — operator opt-out yields {skipped:true, detail:'operator_opted_out'}; no phone yields {skipped:true, detail:'no_phone'}. Live Fonnte quota at 954 at end of test run (did not decrement during opt-out tests = confirms no live send). To run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://dapodik-approval.preview.emergentagent.com pytest backend/tests/test_phase6.py -v
rca of the issue: N/A — all Phase 6 functionality verified working. No bugs found. One minor cosmetic recommendation: add explicit height to recharts ResponsiveContainer parent to silence width(-1) console warnings on first paint.
